record_types.name: Instance

access_types.name: Acc
access_types.code: type Acc is access all Instance;

subprograms.name: Consume
subprograms.code:
procedure Consume (This  : in out Instance;
                   Count :        Storage_Count)

subprograms.name: Read
Read
Seek_Relative

generic_instantiations.name: Seekable_Traits
generic_instantiations.code:
package Seekable_Traits is new Flux.Traits.Seekable_Source
  (Source_Traits, Seek_Relative, Seek_Relative, Consume);

generic_instantiations.name: Sink_Traits
generic_instantiations.code: package Sink_Traits is new Flux.Traits.Sink (Instance, Write, Write);

generic_instantiations.name: Source_Traits
generic_instantiations.code: package Source_Traits is new Flux.Traits.Source (Instance, Read, Read);
